subcodes.first_line: O thou erudite one of the divine school! Spread wide thy hands and wings, shake loose thy sleeves, turn thy attention and spread thy wings anew [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ادیب دبستان الهی دست و پری بگشا و آستینی بیفشان توجهی بنما و بال و پری باز
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @soul; spirit after death, @praise and encouragement, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
